site.description: I'm King3, a developer and detail-oriented builder, founder of OpenKnights. I love turning ideas into real, usable tools — and enjoy both the process of building from scratch and the pursuit of getting every detail just right.

hero.descriptionLine2: When not coding, I'm capturing moments 📷, gaming 🎮, or lost in music 🎵.

about.title: About Me

about.heading: King3.
about.subtitle: Frontend engineer · Open-source builder · Based in

paragraphs.0: Dreaming up cool ideas and making them come true is where my passion lies. I enjoy building cool and fun things with code, and publish them on <openknights>OpenKnights</openknights> and my <github>GitHub</github>. Find my <projects>full projects list here</projects>.
paragraphs.1: I write <blog>blog posts</blog> about open source, programming, and things I learn along the way, and occasionally share them on <bilibili>哔哩哔哩</bilibili>.
paragraphs.2: Outside of code, I enjoy <photos>photography</photos>, compose <poems>poems</poems>, reading novels, and <music>listening to music</music>. In case you are interested, here are the <use>hardware/software I use</use>.
paragraphs.3: I'm based in {city}, if you are around, please reach out and let's grab a coffee or work on something together.

blog.title: Welcome to my blog
blog.description: Writing blog posts is one of my favorite ways to share and reflect, and I hope to pass on useful technical knowledge to more people. I prefer writing about technical topics, but I also write about non-technical topics, such as photography and personal reflections.

project.title: My Projects
project.description: These are all my projects and libraries.
